channel.title: Painting on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Painting on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: Karel Dicker
item.description: Saved under People / Artist / International from the artist reference list. Use this entry for fine art, illustration, gallery, painting, craft, textile, sculpture, photography, and visual moodboard references. Primary location/focus: Netherlands / Abstract Painting.

item.title: Nancy Andrews
item.description: Saved under People / Artist / International from the artist reference list. Use this entry for fine art, illustration, gallery, painting, craft, textile, sculpture, photography, and visual moodboard references. Primary location/focus: USA / Painting & Multimedia.

item.title: Werner Bronkhorst
